# קרלין סטולין — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Karlin-Stolin is a prominent Hasidic dynasty with deep roots in Eastern European Jewish mysticism, founded in the 18th century in Karlin (near Pinsk, Belarus). Known for its distinctive and passionate prayer style — particularly its loud, fervent davening — the movement carries a rich spiritual legacy and strong communal identity. Today it has active communities in Israel, the United States, and beyond, with the Rebbe at its spiritual center.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
הצטרפו לקהילת קרלין סטולין השורשית וגלו מורשת חסידית סוחפת, תפילה נלהבת ומרכז רוחני בלב המסורת. בקרו בבית המדרש שלנו והתחברו לשלשלת הדורות עוד היום!

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About קרלין סטולין
Karlin-Stolin is a prominent Hasidic dynasty with deep roots in Eastern European Jewish mysticism, founded in the 18th century in Karlin (near Pinsk, Belarus). Known for its distinctive and passionate prayer style — particularly its loud, fervent davening — the movement carries a rich spiritual legacy and strong communal identity. Today it has active communities in Israel, the United States, and beyond, with the Rebbe at its spiritual center.

## Target Audience
- חסידי קרלין סטולין, קהילה חרדית, מתעניינים בחסידות
- חסידי קרלין סטולין
- קהילה חרדית
- מתעניינים בחסידות

## Industry
Religious Organization
